message:
fix: generate message ID at creation time in gt mail send (gt-rud3p)

Use mail.NewMessage() instead of raw struct literal to ensure messages
always have an auto-generated ID and thread ID. Also clear ID on fan-out
copies so each recipient gets a unique message ID.

The previous fix (920740ac) added ID generation in sendToSingle as a
safety net, but the proper fix is generating the ID at creation time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
